articles.title: 伊朗战事最新动态：黎巴嫩僵局威胁停火 美国筹备与伊朗会谈
articles.title_original: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Prepares for Talks With Iran as Lebanon Impasse Threatens Cease-Fire

articles.summary_original: Israel said it would continue striking Hezbollah, the Iran-backed Lebanese militia. Continued disruption in the Strait of Hormuz also raised questions about the durability of the truce.

articles.title: 沙特阿拉伯目前维持红海关键港口石油出口
articles.title_original: Saudi Arabia Maintains Oil Exports From Key Red Sea Port for Now
articles.summary: 沙特阿拉伯一条重要跨国输油管道此前遭无人机袭击，目前袭击的影响尚未显现，沙特经红海方向的石油出口暂未受到冲击，整体保持稳定，红海关键港口的石油出口运作维持正常状态。
articles.summary_original: Saudi Arabia’s oil exports via the Red Sea are holding steady for now, as the impact of a drone attack on its vital cross-country pipeline has yet to filter through.

articles.title: OpenAI内部的恐惧与不满
articles.title_original: Fear and loathing at OpenAI
articles.summary: 萨姆·奥尔特曼在OpenAI的任职风波不断，他曾被短暂解除首席执行官职务，仅数日后便复职，随后着手对公司进行永久性改组。本周《纽约客》刊发深度报道，聚焦奥尔特曼本人、他在OpenAI的任职经历及相关问题。

Messy to the point where Altman was briefly fired from his role as CEO, only to be reinstated days later, at which point he began reshaping the organization permanently. articles.title: 美股七日连涨涨势暂停 静待CPI数据与美伊谈判
articles.title_original: US Stocks’ Seven-Day Rally Stalls Ahead of CPI, US-Iran Talks
articles.summary: 美国股指期货在连续七日上涨后涨势陷入停滞，投资者正研判美伊之间达成的脆弱停火能否维持，国际油价正迎来九个月以来的最大单周跌幅，市场静待CPI数据公布。
articles.summary_original: US equity futures stalled after a seven-day rally as investors weighed whether a fragile truce between Washington and Tehran can hold, and oil headed for its biggest weekly loss in nine months.

articles.title: 搁置多年后，Snap接近推出新款AI眼镜
articles.title_original: Snap gets closer to releasing new AI glasses after years-long hiatus
articles.summary: Snap公司长期预热新一代增强现实AI眼镜项目，该项目已搁置多年，近期Snap与高通达成全新合作，此次合作将推动这款眼镜的研发取得实质进展，让该产品距离正式发布更近一步。
articles.summary_original: Specs has long been teasing the next version of its augmented reality glasses. A new partnership with Qualcomm promises some movement in that department.

articles.title: Snap下一代AR眼镜继续采用高通芯片
articles.title_original: Snap is sticking with Qualcomm for its next AR glasses
articles.summary: Snap与高通达成多年战略协议，双方公布，Snap计划年内推出的新一代消费级AR眼镜，将采用高通骁龙XR芯片。Snap布局智能眼镜领域已有十年，此前曾推出搭载摄像头的Spectacles系列智能眼镜产品。
articles.summary_original: Snap's upcoming consumer AR glasses are still set to launch sometime this year, and they'll be powered by a Snapdragon XR chip from Qualcomm, according to an announcement of a "multi-year strategic agreement" between the companies. Snap has been working on smart glasses for a decade, with the first model of its camera-equipped Spectacles glasses […]

articles.title: 俄罗斯与乌克兰同意东正教复活节停火
articles.title_original: Russia and Ukraine agree to Orthodox Easter truce
articles.summary: 俄罗斯与乌克兰已就东正教复活节停火达成一致，俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京宣布了此次停火安排，本次停火从周六下午开始，将一直持续至复活节周日，为复活节期间的相关区域带来短暂的停火窗口。
articles.summary_original: Vladimir Putin announced the truce, which will last from Saturday afternoon through Easter Sunday.

articles.title: GQG克尔斯曼称提早退出大型科技股终获回报
articles.title_original: GQG’s Kersmanc Says Early Big Tech Exit Is Finally Paying Off
articles.summary: 投资机构GQG Partners LLC的布莱恩·克尔斯曼日前公开表示，一年多之前他就做出决策，将自己所管理基金持有的全部科技公司仓位清空，提早退出大型科技赛道，这一决定如今终于开始收获正向回报。
articles.summary_original: Brian Kersmanc at GQG Partners LLC says a decision to empty his funds of tech companies more than a year ago is finally starting to pay off.

articles.title: 美国盘前异动个股：CoreWeave、Docusign、Lumentum、欧加农
articles.title_original: US Premarket Movers: CoreWeave, Docusign, Lumentum, Organon
articles.summary: 截至纽约时间上午7点50分，标普500指数期货几乎无波动。该指数此前已连涨七日，创下该基准指数自10月以来最长上涨周期，目前交易员正等待CPI数据公布，这一连涨势头将面临考验。
articles.summary_original: S&P 500 Index futures are little changed as of 7:50 a.m. in New York. Its seven-day winning streak, the longest run for the benchmark since October, looks set to be tested as traders prepare for CPI data.

articles.title: 货币互换市场美元需求随全球风险回落
articles.title_original: Demand for Dollars in Currency Swaps Ebbs Alongside Global Risks
articles.summary: 当前全球外汇市场总规模达到9.5万亿美元，受美国与伊朗达成脆弱停火协议的影响，全球整体风险局势有所降温，市场中货币互换业务对美元的需求也随之逐步回落。
articles.summary_original: By at least one metric in the $9.5 trillion foreign-exchange markets, demand for the dollar is ebbing amid the tenuous ceasefire between the US and Iran.

articles.summary_original: "The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops. Today's guests: Emmanuel Cau, Barclays, Head of European Equity Strategy; Judy Ganes, J Ganes Consulting, President; Zsuzsanna Szelényi, CEU Democracy Institute, Program Director. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 美国CPI因汽油价格飙升上涨 潜在通胀更趋温和
articles.title_original: US CPI Jumps on Surge in Gas Prices, But Underlying Inflation Is Tamer
articles.summary: 美国消费者物价指数（CPI）受汽油价格大幅上涨推动走高，不过潜在核心通胀水平更为温和。本次相关配图由彭博社摄影师迈克尔·纳格尔拍摄，内容为美国纽约苏豪区的购物民众。

articles.title: Z世代与AI的爱恨关系
articles.title_original: Gen Z’s love-hate relationship with AI
articles.summary: 本周，盖洛普基于对美国近1600名14至29岁受访者的调查发布新报告显示，随着AI愈发深入校园与工作场景，作为数字原住民的Z世代对AI的炒作热度消退，虽越来越不抱幻想，但仍不会停止使用AI。
articles.summary_original: Gen Z is increasingly disillusioned with AI - just not enough to stop using it. A new Gallup report released this week, based on responses from nearly 1,600 people ages 14 to 29 across the US, suggests the hype is wearing off for the digital-native generation as AI becomes more embedded in school and work. articles.title: YouTube Premium服务涨价
articles.title_original: YouTube Premium is getting pricier
articles.summary: 美国地区YouTube Premium服务启动涨价，标准个人账号每月涨价2美元，家庭套餐最高涨价4美元。目前涨价政策已对新注册账号生效，现有用户也正逐步执行新定价，调整后个人套餐每月资费为15.99美元。
articles.summary_original: YouTube Premium is getting more expensive in the US, with prices rising by $2 on standard individual accounts and as much as $4 for the family plan. The price hike is already in effect for new accounts, and is rolling out now for existing customers. Premium's Individual plan now costs $15.99 per month, up from […]

articles.title: SP集团在致印度储备银行公开信中再度推动塔塔父子上市
articles.title_original: SP Group Renews Push for Tata Sons Listing in Open Letter to RBI
articles.summary: 作为塔塔集团控股公司塔塔父子的重要少数股东，SP集团再度呼吁推动塔塔父子公开上市，该集团已向印度储备银行发出公开信，试图说服印度监管机构，称上市是释放投资者价值的必要举措。
articles.summary_original: A substantial minority shareholder of Tata Sons Pvt. reiterated its call for a public listing of the Tata Group holding company, as it sought to convince Indian regulators that such a move is essential to unlock value for investors.

articles.title: 习近平十年内首次会见台湾反对党领袖
articles.title_original: Xi Meets Taiwan Opposition Leader for First Time in a Decade
articles.summary: 习近平与台湾反对党领袖郑丽文举行罕见会谈，这是十年来中国大陆最高领导人首次同台湾反对党领袖开展此类会见，郑丽文在会谈中提出构想，称未来将邀请习近平访问台湾。
articles.summary_original: Xi Jinping held rare talks with a Taiwanese opposition leader, Cheng Li-wun, who floated the idea of some day inviting Mr. Xi to visit Taiwan.

articles.title: 押注欧尔班将下台 匈牙利资产周日选举前集体上涨
articles.title_original: Hungary Assets Rally Into Sunday’s Ballot on Orban Exit Bets
articles.summary: 匈牙利将于周日举行大选，投资者普遍预期此次选举将终结总理维克托·欧尔班长达16年的执政。受这一预期推动，该国债券、股票以及本国货币纷纷走高，逼近多年来的高点。
articles.summary_original: Hungary’s election rally has pushed the country’s bonds, stocks and its currency to the brink of multi-year highs ahead of Sunday’s ballot, which investors anticipate will end Prime Minister Viktor Orban’s 16-year rule.

articles.title: 可能我们都低估了《王者荣耀世界》
articles.summary: 《王者荣耀世界》PC端今日正式公测，计划4月内上线移动端。它此前被部分人视为收割IP价值的跟风产品，实际锚定王者IP用户未被满足的沉浸探索、情感共鸣需求，简化养成设计，采用仅外观付费模式，是承接王者IP沉淀内容的关键新作。

articles.title: 伊朗设限 霍尔木兹海峡政治问题仍棘手
articles.title_original: With Iran Setting Limits, Strait of Hormuz Remains Thorny Politically
articles.summary: 霍尔木兹海峡达成停火后，伊朗仍对海峡通航交通保持扼控。这迫使相关国家不得不与伊朗达成协议，而这类协议的达成大概率会引发相关国家与美国之间的矛盾分歧，霍尔木兹海峡的政治难题至今仍十分棘手。
articles.summary_original: Even after a cease-fire, Iran is keeping a chokehold on traffic, forcing countries to cut deals that could put them at odds with the U.S.

articles.summary: 日前，一名德国籍跨性别极右极端分子在捷克共和国被警方逮捕。据德国媒体公开披露，该嫌疑人名为马拉-斯文娅·利比希，此前曾加入臭名昭著的新纳粹极端组织"鲜血与荣誉"。
articles.summary_original: German media reports say Marla-Svenja Liebich used to be a member of a neo-Nazi group called Blood and Honour.

articles.title: 《星群》

articles.summary: 一艘飞船迫降在远离家园的星球，飞船无法修复，求救信标失灵，仅余下叙述者、领航员、残存的部分船长与飞船AI存活。这颗星球的大气对绝大多数生物具有毒性，幸存者困在救生艇中，处境凶险，生死未卜。
articles.summary_original: I. We had crash-landed on the planet. We were far from home. The spaceship could not be repaired, and the rescue beacon had failed. articles.title: 黎巴嫩：因战争流离失所的国家影像
articles.title_original: Lebanon: Images of a Nation Uprooted by War
articles.summary: 以色列与黎巴嫩真主党近期再次爆发冲突，目前黎巴嫩已有一百万民众被迫逃离家园，相关内容以影像记录这些流离失所民众当下的真实生活，展现了本轮冲突给当地普通民众带来的深重苦难。
articles.summary_original: A million people in Lebanon have fled their homes as Israel clashes anew with Hezbollah. This is what their lives look now.

articles.title: 相约平壤：俄罗斯推动本国民众亲近朝鲜

articles.summary_original: Through art, food, tourism and academics, an increasingly isolated Moscow is seeking to cement lasting ties with Pyongyang.

articles.title: 这座匈牙利城镇揭示欧尔班周日可能败选的原因

articles.summary_original: Lake Balaton was beloved as a vacation spot. Now, luxury real estate projects serve many friends of Prime Minister Viktor Orban, and the locals are fed up.

articles.title: 许多委内瑞拉人想归国却无法办理护照
articles.title_original: Many Venezuelans Want to Go Home. But They Can’t Get Passports.
articles.summary: 大量滞留海外的委内瑞拉人正陷入进退维谷的境地：美国不允许他们在当地合法居留，他们想要返回祖国，却因委内瑞拉国内难以办理护照无法顺利成行，最终落得既不能留在美国、也无法返回母国的尴尬处境。
articles.summary_original: The U.S. has made it impossible for them to stay legally, and their own country makes it difficult for them to return.

articles.title: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普否认与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦有关联，呼吁为幸存者举行听证会

articles.summary_original: She called rumours that Epstein introduced her to Donald Trump "mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation".

articles.title: 自十月以来美国接收4499名难民 除三人外均为南非人
articles.title_original: US has let in 4,499 refugees since October - all but three were South African
articles.summary: 特朗普称南非白人少数群体阿非利卡人遭受迫害，将其列为难民接纳优先对象，这一表述遭到南非方面反对。数据显示，自十月以来美国共接收4499名难民，除三人外全部来自南非。
articles.summary_original: Trump has given priority to Afrikaners, a white minority group he says is being persecuted. South Africa has objected to his characterisation.

articles.title: 台湾在野党领袖在北京会见习近平
articles.title_original: Taiwan opposition leader meets Xi Jinping in Beijing
articles.summary: 台湾中国国民党现任领袖郑丽文在北京会见中国国家主席习近平，这是十年来国民党首位现任党领袖访问中国大陆，打破了国民党现任领袖十年未访大陆的空白，此次会面备受两岸各界及舆论的广泛关注。
articles.summary_original: Cheng Li-wun is the Kuomintang's first sitting leader to visit China in a decade.

articles.title: 南非作家姆丰迪·文德拉在新话剧中融入个人经历
articles.title_original: South African Writer Mfundi Vundla Gets Personal in His New Play
articles.summary: 曾流亡海外21年的南非作家姆丰迪·文德拉，曾打造出热门电视剧《世代》。他最新推出一部话剧作品，围绕反种族隔离斗争存在的不完美之处展开探讨，作品融入了诸多与个人经历相关的内容。
articles.summary_original: Mfundi Vundla spent 21 years in exile and created the popular television show “Generations.” His latest project is a play that explores the imperfections of the fight against apartheid.

articles.title: 白宫工作人员被告知不得在预测市场下注
articles.title_original: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
articles.summary: 近年来带有赌博性质的预测市场平台人气渐长，不少用户会在这类平台针对各类事件下注，其中不乏对各类冲突事件的押注。目前相关方面已明确告知白宫工作人员，不得在这类预测市场进行下注。
articles.summary_original: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.

articles.title: 特朗普称伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的管控‘不符合我们达成的协议’
articles.title_original: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
articles.summary: 以色列与黎巴嫩即将开启和平谈判，在此节点，美国总统特朗普公开指责伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡的处理工作十分糟糕，表示伊朗当前对该海峡的管控不符合双方此前达成的相关协议。
articles.summary_original: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.

articles.title: 早期项目 | 字节、OPPO、一加三重背景产品人，将软硬一体写入底层，要让AI看懂世界
articles.summary: 拥有字节跳动、OPPO、一加从业背景的曾熙，2025年创办Chance AI，推出以摄像头为核心交互入口的Visual Agent视觉智能体，主打实时视觉推理，其多模态评测成绩居世界第一，目前全球下载量超20万，计划2026年拓展北美学生市场，坚持软硬一体路线。

articles.title: 嘻哈先驱阿非利卡·班巴塔去世，享年68岁
articles.title_original: Hip-hop pioneer, Afrika Bambaataa,  dies aged 68
articles.summary: 出生于美国布朗克斯的知名说唱歌手、嘻哈先驱阿非利卡·班巴塔去世，享年68岁。他创作的全球热门单曲《行星摇滚》被公认为塑造了1980年代的嘻哈风格，对整个嘻哈文化发展影响深远。
articles.summary_original: The Bronx born rapper's global hit Planet Rock is credited with shaping hip-hop in the 1980s.

articles.title: 印度拟出台新规监管社交媒体上的新闻及政治帖文
articles.title_original: India proposes new rules to regulate news and political posts on social media
articles.summary: 印度拟出台新规，对社交媒体平台上的新闻类与政治类帖文实施监管。此次规则调整后，印度政府将获得更大管控权限，可对播客创作者、网络影响力博主分享的新闻相关帖文进行监管。
articles.summary_original: The changes will give government more power over news-related posts shared by podcasters and influencers.

articles.title: 遭受重创的伊朗领导人走出战事 信心十足手握新筹码
articles.title_original: Iran’s Battered Leaders Emerge From War Confident — and With New Cards
articles.summary: 对伊朗神权统治者而言，能够挺过美以发起的攻击本身就意味着胜利。经历冲突后，遭受打击的伊朗领导层走出战事时信心十足，还握有全新筹码，但该国下一场危机的种子，或许早已埋下。
articles.summary_original: For Iran’s theocratic rulers, just surviving the U.S.-Israeli onslaught means victory. But the seeds of their next crisis may already be planted.

articles.title: 8点1氪｜“张雪峰.skill”上线GitHub引争议；康师傅“再来一瓶”被曝多店不兑换；微信回应“夫妻用AI写公众号年赚200万”
articles.summary: 近期多个热点事件引发关注：GitHub上线模仿已故咨询师张雪峰的AI项目“张雪峰.skill”引发侵权争议；康师傅“再来一瓶”促销多地商家拒兑奖引发消费者不满；微信明确禁止AI替代真人创作公众号内容，此外还有腾讯云涨价、李佳琦澄清退休传言等热点。

articles.title: 无论停火与否，中东格局重塑仍未完成
articles.title_original: Ceasefire or no ceasefire, the Middle East's reshuffling is not yet done
articles.summary: 当前中东冲突双方均有结束战事的理由，但并未就停火问题达成共识。无论最终能否实现停火，中东地区正在推进的力量格局调整洗牌进程仍未结束，地区新秩序尚未落定，局势走向仍存在不确定性。
articles.summary_original: Both sides have reason to end the war but share no common ground.

articles.title: ChatGPT推出每月100美元的全新专业订阅服务
articles.title_original: ChatGPT has a new $100 per month Pro subscription
articles.summary: OpenAI宣布推出全新档位的ChatGPT Pro专业订阅服务，月费为100美元。对比月费20美元的ChatGPT Plus订阅，新专业档提供五倍的Codex编码工具使用额度，OpenAI称其更适合长时间、高需求的Codex使用场景。

The new Pro tier offers "5x more" usage of its Codex coding tool than the $20 per month Plus subscription and "is best for longer, high-effort Codex sessions," OpenAI says. The company is introducing the new tier as it […]

articles.title: 当前苹果手表最佳优惠汇总
articles.title_original: Here are the best Apple Watch deals available right now
articles.summary: 苹果于九月推出全新系列智能手表，包含Apple Watch Series 11、SE 3以及Ultra 3三款新品，每款各有优劣。新款可穿戴设备上市后，目前市面在售的苹果手表型号比以往任何时候都多，随之也涌现出不少相关优惠。
articles.summary_original: In September, Apple launched its latest batch of smartwatches, including the Apple Watch Series 11, the SE 3, and the Ultra 3. Each has its own pros and cons, but the introduction of Apple’s newest wearables also means there are now more Apple Watch models on the market than ever before — and a lot […]

articles.title: 美伊会谈前夕CPI符合预期 股市上涨——市场综述
articles.title_original: Stocks Rise on In-Line CPI Ahead of US-Iran Talks: Markets Wrap
articles.summary: 能源成本受战争推动大幅攀升后，最新出炉的通胀数据符合市场预期，这一结果带动股市走高，美国与伊朗计划于本周末举行会谈，市场在利好数据的推动下整体上行。
articles.summary_original: The first inflation snapshot of the war-fueled spike in energy costs matched expectations, driving stocks higher ahead of this weekend’s planned talks between the US and Iran.

articles.title: 佛罗里达州对OpenAI展开调查
articles.title_original: Florida launches investigation into OpenAI
articles.summary: 路透社早前报道，美国佛罗里达州总检察长詹姆斯·乌特迈尔周四发表声明，因存在公共安全与国家安全风险方面的担忧，宣布对OpenAI启动调查。乌特迈尔声称，担忧OpenAI的数据和技术会落入中国共产党等美国所谓‘敌人’手中。
articles.summary_original: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier is launching an investigation into OpenAI over public safety and national security risks, as reported earlier by Reuters. In a statement on Thursday, Uthmeier says there are concerns that OpenAI's data and technology are "falling into the hands of America's enemies, such as the Chinese Communist Party." Uthmeier also says […]

articles.title: 佛罗里达州对OpenAI启动调查
articles.title_original: Florida launches investigation into OpenAI

In a statement on Thursday, Uthmeier says there are concerns that OpenAI's data and technology are "falling into the hands of America's enemies, such as the Chinese Communist Party." articles.title: 佛罗里达总检察长将调查OpenAI 称其或与佛州立大学校园枪击案有关
articles.title_original: Florida AG to probe OpenAI, alleging possible connection to FSU shooting
articles.summary: 佛罗里达州总检察长詹姆斯·尤特迈尔计划对OpenAI展开调查。本次调查涉及多项事由，包括OpenAI涉嫌对未成年人造成伤害、可能威胁国家安全，此外还指称其可能与去年发生在佛罗里达州立大学的枪击案存在关联。
articles.summary_original: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier plans to investigate OpenAI for its alleged harm to minors, potential to threaten national security, and its possible link to a shooting at Florida State University last year.

articles.title: 电子前哨基金会将退出X平台
articles.title_original: The EFF is quitting X
articles.summary: 数字隐私非营利组织电子前哨基金会自周四起将停止在X平台发帖，此次退出主要源于过去几年该平台内容浏览量的大幅下滑，该组织社交媒体与视频经理肯雅塔·托马斯在博客文章中公布了这一退出决定。
articles.summary_original: The digital privacy nonprofit Electronic Frontier Foundation will no longer be posting on X as of Thursday, largely due to a sharp decline in views on the platform over the past several years. In a blog post announcing the departure, EFF's social media and video manager Kenyatta Thomas explained that the nonprofit used to get […]

articles.title: ChatGPT终于推出月费100美元的专业套餐
articles.title_original: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
articles.summary: OpenAI周四宣布推出高端用户期盼已久的ChatGPT月费100美元专业套餐。此前ChatGPT订阅仅设有每月20美元和200美元两档，定价跨度较大，新套餐填补了中间档位的空白，可满足相关核心用户的需求。
articles.summary_original: OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month.

articles.title: ChatGPT终于推出月费100美元的专业套餐
articles.title_original: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
articles.summary: OpenAI于周四正式推出资深用户期盼已久的月费100美元的专业套餐。在此之前，ChatGPT仅设有每月20美元和每月200美元两档订阅，新套餐填补了两档之间的价位空白，满足了高级用户的使用需求。
articles.summary_original: OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month.

articles.title: 电子前哨基金会成为最新退出X的组织
articles.title_original: EFF is the latest organization to leave X
articles.summary: 此前已有多家新闻机构及其他机构退出社交媒体平台X，这类机构均认为X已不再是能提供有效流量的可行渠道，电子前哨基金会紧随这些机构脚步，成为最新一家退出X平台的组织。
articles.summary_original: The EFF follows the departure of various news organizations and others who no longer find X a viable source of traffic.

articles.title: 约翰迪尔将就维修权诉讼向农民赔付9900万美元
articles.title_original: John Deere will pay farmers $99 million over right-to-repair lawsuit
articles.summary: 据路透此前报道，农业巨头约翰迪尔在一起集体诉讼中，被指控阻止农民及维修人员获取农用设备维修所需材料。目前约翰迪尔已同意赔付9900万美元和解此案，将按方案向相关方开放维修资源。
articles.summary_original: John Deere has agreed to pay farmers $99 million to resolve a class action lawsuit that accused the agricultural giant of preventing farmers and mechanics from accessing the materials needed to repair equipment, as reported earlier by Reuters. As part of the proposed settlement, John Deere says it will make repair resources available for a […]

articles.title: 创始人可从安朱纳的裁员与复苏中学到什么
articles.title_original: What founders can learn from Anjuna’s layoffs and recovery
articles.summary: 风投支持的网络安全公司安朱纳安全2021年发展迅猛，当时市场看似增长空间无限，公司大举招聘扩张，到2021年底已扩张至约75名员工，完成了销售、客户成功及支持团队搭建，预期业务将持续保持高速增长，不料2022年形势突变。
articles.summary_original: In 2021, Anjuna Security was growing fast, hiring aggressively, and chasing a market that seemed limitless. By the end of that year, the venture-backed cybersecurity company had scaled to around 75 employees, building out sales, customer success, and support teams in anticipation of continued hypergrowth. Then 2022 hit.

articles.title: 大众汽车在美国停推纯电ID.4 重新转向燃油SUV领域
articles.title_original: Volkswagen drops all-electric ID.4 in the US in pivot back to gas SUVs
articles.summary: 大众汽车调整在美业务方向，停止推进纯电车型ID.4的在美布局，将业务重心转回燃油SUV赛道。目前大众位于美国的工厂已将全部资源，投入到即将推出的Atlas SUV项目筹备工作中。
articles.summary_original: All resources at its U.S. factory are aimed at the upcoming Atlas SUV.

articles.title: 佛罗里达州总检察长就涉ChatGPT枪击案宣布调查OpenAI
articles.title_original: Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
articles.summary: 去年四月，美国佛罗里达州立大学发生枪击案，造成2人死亡、5人受伤。据悉枪手使用ChatGPT策划本次袭击，一名受害者家属表示计划就该事件起诉OpenAI，佛罗里达州总检察长日前宣布对OpenAI启动调查。
articles.summary_original: ChatGPT had reportedly been used to plan the attack that killed two and injured five at Florida State University last April. The family of one victim has said that they plan to sue OpenAI over the incident.

articles.title: 佛罗里达州总检察长宣布就涉及ChatGPT的枪击案调查OpenAI
articles.title_original: Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
articles.summary: 去年4月，美国佛罗里达州立大学发生枪击案，造成2人死亡、5人受伤，据悉凶手曾使用ChatGPT策划此次袭击。目前佛罗里达州总检察长已宣布对OpenAI启动调查，一名受害者家属也表示计划就该事件起诉OpenAI。
articles.summary_original: ChatGPT had reportedly been used to plan the attack that killed two and injured five at Florida State University last April. The family of one victim has said that they plan to sue OpenAI over the incident.

articles.title: StubHub将支付1000万美元和解FTC欺诈性票价指控
articles.title_original: StubHub to pay $10M to settle FTC allegations over ‘deceptive’ ticket pricing
articles.summary: 美国联邦贸易委员会（FTC）指出，票务平台StubHub在网站宣传票价时，未提前明确披露包含所有强制费用在内的总价格，存在欺骗性定价行为，违反了相关法规，该公司将就这一指控支付1000万美元达成和解。
articles.summary_original: The consumer protection agency says the company violated the FTC Act and its Rule on Unfair or Deceptive Fees by "deceptively" advertising ticket prices on its website without clearly disclosing upfront what the total cost would be, including all mandatory fees.
